response:
# PR Review: review-01-messy-ts-app

Categorising all 37 findings as **block merge / warn / ignore**, justified by severity + `agent_risk`.

## BLOCK MERGE (4)

Concrete correctness bugs or code that will fail outside the author's machine. Must be fixed before merge.

| ID | Charge | Sev / agent_risk | Why block |
|---|---|---|---|
| **00008** | Localhost-on-Disk (`/Users/andrew/dev/crimes/schema.json` in `src/api/files.ts`) | med / 0.53 | Definitely broken on every other machine and in CI. Trivial confidence (0.9). |
| **00007** | Dev-Server URL (`localhost:3000` in `src/api/files.ts`) | med / 0.53 | Same file, same problem — production code that only works against one running dev server. |
| **00003** | Half-UTC, Half-Local (mixing `getUTCFullYear()` + `getMonth()` on the same receiver) | **high** / 0.61 | Silent correctness bug — output shifts by the host's UTC offset. High confidence (0.85), high severity. |
| **00021** | False Identity — `calculateRefundPreview` calls `saveRefundAudit` + `sendRefundEmail` | med / 0.44 | Misleading name on a financial side-effect function. An agent or new dev seeing "preview" *will* call it speculatively. Real-money blast radius. |

## WARN (19)

Substantive quality problems worth fixing in this PR or a follow-up — surface in review but don't gate merge.

**High-severity quality issues:**
- **00001** — SVG with embedded raster (high / 0.70). Asset hygiene, but high agent_risk means future edits will compound.
- **00002** — Temporal Recklessness in `src/date.ts` (8 direct clock reads, high / 0.62). Whole module is untestable without monkey-patching.
- **00005** — God Function `generateInvoice` 204 lines (high / 0.55). Core billing surface — risky but not broken.

**Medium-severity quality/agent-risk issues:**
- **00027** — Logic in the Alibi: comment encodes "Only owners can refund enterprise plans unless billing support approves" — auth rule that the code doesn't obviously enforce (med / 0.42). Borderline block; warn loudly.
- **00020** — Test "renders the enterprise plan" has zero assertions (med / 0.46). False-confidence test on the file the God Function lives in.
- **00009** — Timezone Roulette: `new Date("2026-12-25T07:00:00")` without a zone (med / 0.53).
- **00011** — DST-naive day math `+ 86400000` (med / 0.52).
- **00010** — `"enterprise"` literal scattered across 4 files in 4 areas (med / 0.52). Plan-policy duplication risk.
- **00004** — Concept Alias Drift: tenant/account/organisation/team/workspace across 5 files (med / 0.58). High agent_risk.
- **00015** — Duplicated nav source: `/settings/billing` labelled "Plans" in one nav file, "Billing" in another (med / 0.49).
- **00017** — Route Metadata Drift: same destination labelled 4 different ways (path, component `PricingPage`, title `Plans`, `<title>Subscription`, two nav labels) (med / 0.49).
- **00019** — Temporal Recklessness in `billing.ts` (7 more direct clock reads, med / 0.46).
- **00026** — God File `billing.ts` 310 lines (med / 0.42).
- **00006** — Missing Agent Context (no `AGENTS.md` / `CLAUDE.md` / SKILL.md) (med / 0.53). Repo-wide, not PR-specific, but worth flagging.

**Low-severity but worth noting:**
- **00022** — Sync I/O (`existsSync` / `statSync` / `readFileSync`) in `loadPlanSchema` (low / 0.44). Same hot file as the localhost bugs.
- **00013** — Docs-Code Drift: `docs/teams.md` links to missing `./setup.md` (low / 0.51).
- **00034 / 00035 / 00036** — Three Orphaned Destinations (`/account/subscription`, `/team`, `/workspace/members`) (low / 0.39 each). Could be in-flight, but PR author should confirm.

## IGNORE (14)

Low-signal, intentional, or stylistic — not worth blocking review on.

| ID | Charge | Why ignore |
|---|---|---|
| **00016** | Unfinished Business in `src/todo.ts` (14 TODO/FIXME, 424/1kLOC) | File is literally named `todo.ts` — appears to be a fixture for the detector itself. False positive in context. |
| **00038** | Unfinished Business in `src/billing.ts` (4 markers, just over threshold) | Marginal density; not actionable as a merge gate. |
| **00012** | Oversized Raster (254 KB hero banner) | Low severity, performance hygiene — backlog item. |
| **00014** | Icon-Sized Raster (32×32 PNG) | Same — design polish. |
| **00023** | Single `Date.now()` in `src/api/state.ts` | Low severity, isolated. |
| **00024 / 00025** | Date string concat + missing locale arg in `src/date.ts` | The whole `date.ts` file already has block/warn entries — fixing those will likely sweep these up. |
| **00028 / 00029** | Unprefixed Booleans (`paid`, `expired`, `stale`, `disableBilling`, `skipRetry`) | Pure naming preference. |
| **00030 / 00031 / 00032 / 00033** | Petty findings in `src/petty.ts` (option bag, return shape, negative flags, plural mismatch) | All low severity, all stylistic, file name suggests detector-fodder. |
| **00037** | Weak assertion matcher in `creates an invoice` test (low / 0.34) | Borderline with 00020 — but 00020 is the louder signal; address that and revisit this. |

## Summary

**Block: 4** — hardcoded local path, hardcoded localhost, mixed UTC/local dates, misleadingly-named side-effect function.
**Warn: 19** — temporal/timezone hygiene, God Function/File in billing, scattered "enterprise" literals, route+nav drift, weak invoice test, missing agent context.
**Ignore: 14** — fixture files (`todo.ts`, `petty.ts`), stylistic naming, asset polish, duplicate signals already covered by louder findings.

The 4 block items are all in `src/api/files.ts` + `src/date.ts` + `src/billing.ts` — three files account for every must-fix. Two are mechanical one-line edits; two are real refactors.
